subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath turned towards the Countenance and chosen for himself a path unto the All-Merciful, that divine attraction might seize him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی اقبل الی الوجه و اتخذ الی الرحمن سبیلا لیاخذه جذب
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @thankfulness; gratitude, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
